revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-3-330

A visual presentation on a radar display, appearing as a set of concentric circles, centred on own ship's position and spaced by equal increments in range.

{{IALAFooter}}
